      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "\n",
        "# Set plotting style for aesthetics\n",
        "sns.set_theme(style=\"whitegrid\")\n",
        "plt.rcParams['figure.figsize'] = (10, 6)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1) Load the 'taxis' dataset\n",
        "df = sns.load_dataset(\"taxis\")\n",
        "print(f\"Dataset Loaded. Shape: {df.shape}\")\n",
        "df.head()"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Check for missing values\n",
        "print(\"--- Missing Values Before Cleaning ---\")\n",
        "print(df.isnull().sum())\n",
        "\n",
        "# Strategy implementation:\n",
        "# 1. Critical columns where imputation might skew results -> Drop rows\n",
        "df.dropna(subset=['pickup_borough', 'dropoff_borough', 'payment'], inplace=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Categorical columns -> Impute with Mode\n",
        "df['color'] = df['color'].fillna(df['color'].mode()[0])\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Numerical columns -> Impute with Median (robust to outliers)\n",
        "if df['tolls'].isnull().sum() > 0:\n",
        "    df['tolls'] = df['tolls'].fillna(df['tolls'].median())\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n--- Missing Values After Cleaning ---\")\n",
        "print(df.isnull().sum())"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "JI0rOV7XI0Yx",
        "outputId": "9745fcbc-8e77-4105-aaa0-8af6d97d87c3"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",

          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Convert pickup column to datetime format\n",
        "df['pickup'] = pd.to_datetime(df['pickup'])\n",
        "\n",
        "# Sort by pickup time and plot\n",
        "df_sorted = df.sort_values('pickup')\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 5))\n",
        "plt.plot(df_sorted['pickup'], df_sorted['fare'], color='tab:blue', alpha=0.6)\n",
        "plt.title('Taxi Fare Over Time')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Pickup Timestamp')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Fare ($)')\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 120
        },
        "id": "iMcrge94LEkV",
        "outputId": "ad61d9c0-61d6-4202-c6ab-e983d24982d0"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1200x500 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# --- 2. Bar Chart ---\n",
        "fare_by_borough = df.groupby('pickup_borough')['fare'].sum()\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "fare_by_borough.plot(kind='bar', color='skyblue', edgecolor='black')\n",
        "plt.title('Total Fare by Pickup Borough')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Pickup Borough')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Total Fare ($)')\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=0)\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 3. Pie Chart ---\n",
        "payment_counts = df['payment'].value_counts()\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "payment_counts.plot(kind='pie', autopct='%1.1f%%', startangle=90, colors=['#ff9999','#66b3ff'])\n",
        "plt.title('Distribution of Trips by Payment Method')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('')\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 4. Histogram ---\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "df['distance'].plot(kind='hist', bins=30, color='darkseagreen', edgecolor='black')\n",
        "plt.title('Distribution of Trip Distances')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Distance (Miles)')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Frequency')\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 5. Box Plot ---\n",
        "boroughs = df['pickup_borough'].unique()\n",
        "tip_data = [df[df['pickup_borough'] == b]['tip'] for b in boroughs]\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "plt.boxplot(tip_data, labels=boroughs)\n",
        "plt.title('Distribution of Tip Amounts by Pickup Borough')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Pickup Borough')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Tip Amount ($)')\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {

        {
          "output_type": "display_data",

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# --- 1. Count Plot ---\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "sns.countplot(data=df, x='pickup_borough', palette='Set2')\n",
        "plt.title('Number of Trips by Pickup Borough')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Pickup Borough')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Trip Count')\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 2. Scatter Plot ---\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "sns.scatterplot(data=df, x='distance', y='fare', hue='pickup_borough', alpha=0.7)\n",
        "plt.title('Relationship Between Trip Distance and Fare')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Distance (Miles)')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Fare ($)')\n",
        "plt.legend(title='Pickup Borough')\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 3. Heatmap ---\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))\n",
        "numerical_cols = ['distance', 'fare', 'tip', 'tolls', 'total']\n",
        "corr_matrix = df[numerical_cols].corr()\n",
        "sns.heatmap(corr_matrix, annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', fmt=\".2f\", linewidths=0.5)\n",
        "plt.title('Correlation Heatmap of Numerical Variables')\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# --- 4. Violin Plot ---\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "sns.violinplot(data=df, x='payment', y='fare', palette='Pastel1')\n",
        "plt.title('Fare Distribution by Payment Method')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Payment Method')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Fare ($)')\n",
        "plt.show()"

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# --- Pair Plot ---\n",
        "# Sampling the top 5 most frequent zones so the plot renders cleanly\n",
        "top_zones = df['pickup_zone'].value_counts().nlargest(5).index\n",
        "df_filtered_zone = df[df['pickup_zone'].isin(top_zones)]\n",
        "\n",
        "sns.pairplot(data=df_filtered_zone, vars=['distance', 'fare', 'tip', 'total'], hue='pickup_zone', palette='Dark2')\n",
        "plt.suptitle('Pairwise Relationships of Key Metrics by Top Pickup Zones', y=1.02)\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
